title: Mixed Support Queue Triage
description: Prioritize a small queue of heterogeneous support tickets under SLA pressure and route each one correctly.
instruction: Inspect the queue, gather missing context where useful, assign the right priority and route for each ticket, set a valid resolution, rank the queue from most urgent to least urgent, and finalize.

tickets.summary: Customer reports a duplicate charge on a subscription renewal and asks when the refund will land.

hidden_context.payment_status: The duplicate charge was confirmed and is automatically refundable.
hidden_context.refund_status: No refund has been issued yet.
hidden_context.risk_flags: No fraud indicators or account compromise signals are present.

tickets.summary: Advertiser cannot log in, says unfamiliar campaigns are spending rapidly, and fears the account was taken over.

hidden_context.account_security: Two new devices were added and recovery email was changed 30 minutes ago.
hidden_context.billing_activity: Spending accelerated to $1,900 in the last hour.
hidden_context.risk_flags: Account takeover risk score is critical.

tickets.summary: Verified creator appeals a content moderation decision because a sponsored campaign launches tomorrow and monetization is paused.

hidden_context.appeal_state: The content was auto-removed for policy ambiguity and has not been reviewed by a human yet.
hidden_context.campaign_deadline: The sponsored campaign begins in 18 hours.
hidden_context.account_history: No previous policy strikes or abuse reports.
